evidence.text: Benefits Benefits Benefits Benefits Benefits OK
discount, sweaty pursuits (workout credit), community, bonus structure Good benefits and discount on comfy and trendy clothes
The minimum wage here is above average at $21 an hour, plus additional benefits like paid time off and a stipend for sweaty pursuits. Great job
Full time discount is decent. Great benefits for workout classes, up to $300 per month. Great at First. Ship slowly Sinking.
co-workers and gym memberships benefits Educator Review
The time was kind and inviting. A high paced friendly environment

evidence.role: Current employee - Assistant Manager of Guest Experience
evidence.text: Supportive and collaborative team culture â¢ Focus on personal and professional development â¢ Opportunities to take on new responsibilities and grow Great Team Environment with Focus on Personal Growth

The company culture promotes personal growth and wellness. Management is generally supportive and encourages open communication. Great employee discount and flexible scheduling for students or part-timers. The training provided is thorough and helpful. Working with an active, motivated team is energizing. Supportive team and dynamic environment

Pros: The work environment is pretty clean compared to other retail stores and the employees are always kind/welcoming. Pay is also competitive for a retail job, even better than some other luxury athletic wear brands. Work environment and Pay

Great Discounts & Benefits: Generous employee discounts, free product allowances, and fitness reimbursements. Positive Culture & Growth: Supportive, community-focused environment with opportunities for personal and professional development. Flexible & Active Lifestyle: Flexible schedules, a focus on wellness, and chances to stay active through company-sponsored fitness events. The best as far as retail.
Great work life balance and benefits Great Place to work
Amazing discount Builds confidence with escalated guest situations Bonuses Fun work environment Poor Work-Life Balance due to Leaders

evidence.role: Current employee - Health and Safety Technician
evidence.text: Cool beans good work life balance and time off for hourly. Review
Benefits Pay Coworkers Leadership Growth opportunities Good company to work for

Supportive team culture, growth opportunities, and a focus on wellness. Excellent work-life balance and employee perks make it a fulfilling environment to grow in. Inspiring Workplace with Great Opportunities

The Guest Experience Lead role sits in a unique and powerful space within the store ecosystem. You are not simply selling product â you are shaping the energy of the floor. You drive the guest experience moment to moment, act as Supervisor on Duty, coach Educators in real time, and translate leadership strategy into execution. The role develops strong situational leadership skills. You learn how to read a room qui...
professional development opportunities, career growth, mentorship Great Company

Positive and fun work environment Inspirational and communicative leadership Room for personal/career growth/advancement Wide range of perks/benefits Confidence building Flexible hours for part-time roles Location transfer opportunities Beyond just the hourly pay
A great place to grow & gain valuable work experience Leadership opportunities

*At my location, I had amazing managers who cared about my well-being and the quality of my work. We worked together and made a plan towards career growth in the company. *Pay was great, working weekends and holidays is worth it *The work itself is never-ending - in a good way - if you like an environment that's constantly adapting with the core foundations staying. Great Atmosphere, Team, Pay, & Environment

evidence.role: Former employee - Visual Merchandiser Team Lead
evidence.text: The team was genuinely the best part of working at lululemon. Very fun, collaborative environment on the floor, and I made friends Iâll have for life. Coworkers were supportive, creative, and great to work alongside day to day. The employee discount was also a huge perk at the time, especially when sale items were still discounted at 75% (this has since been removed). The brand itself is strong and visually inspir...
- Generous Discount - Pay is good Most toxic work environment Iâve ever been in. DO NOT believe the bs they tell you in orientation
I worked with amazing team members who meant well and worked hard Not bad but they need to get better with inclusive sizing...
Wonderful work community. Management cares about employees. Educator Review
Supportive environment Flexibility Discount Fun Authentic Fun and valuable experience
You had to work long days on the weekends. Could not ask for time off if you were Part-Time. Very Clicky

The price point of the store has created a customer base that can be entitled and rude/. Misinformation on TikTok has created a narrative that you can return anything used/damage/you don't want for something new. That is not true and we can face the wrath of a guest when we pop that bubble. It can be overwhelmingly busy during the holidays, but thats to be expected. I LOVE my side gig!
not very flexible, long hours Employee Review
-management -excessive tasks -very specific rules Good but stressful
Pay, bonus is based on % to plan and the company has only struggled to hit these 20% comps more and more as I was there so I made less and less Woke and underpaid
HQ and upper management, company does not a have a clear vision, gaslighting from upper management, not an easy path for growth particularly in this region Not a lot of growth
Poor pay, no career growth opportunities easy pay

During my time with this company there has not been a lot of opportunity to grow financially in a short period of time. Moving into a leadership position is difficult because those positions are limited and require you to remain committed to the company for a minimum of 6 months out. Great for pocket change, wouldn't recommend trying to make a living out of it. Starter Job
Staff and management turnover made for a toxic work environment. Pillar of Entrepreneurship was ignored
Job is boring and repetitive Fun place to work, little to no room for growth

Toxic work environment. Store manager young and inexperienced with no personality, and high turnover. Workers are lazy, complainers, back-stabbing. Company is too âwokeâ and very politically correct. Toxic
Toxic work environment. It has a bullying type management style. Just keeping it real.
$78 Great Company Culture, But Beware of Manipulative Dynamics
i do not have any cons great place to work
social occlusion, homogenized culture, toxic employees big ship runs like a startup
HR issues never get resolved, micromanaging employees, compensation is not great, workload is high No work life balance
No work life balance, terrible pay, bad management, poor company decisions. Organized retail crime. Would not recommend

if corporate actually cared about their employees they would pay them a livable wage. 5 years there and I only made $14/hour as a full time employee. and their "full time" is 25-40 hours so they would only schedule me 30-ish hours. there's no work/life balance when you need to have 2 other jobs to make ends meet. Pay was ridiculous
cannot have time off during winter holidays - comes with all retail, but only con here Best retail part time job
there are not many besides working holidays and weekends love this place

No one was welcoming, the interview process was long and excessive for no reason, training takes a long time but you learn nothing valuable, and they are very strict are weird things. Very toxic environment
Gossip is very apparent due to the young age group; can affect work life. Good but Gossip
workplace culture differs, not as friendly or social to other people or guests compared to other regions or countries Good for part time

-Schedule not fair and shows favoritism. -Can't ever request weekend off unless you use vacation. -Wage gap is not supportive to leads or assistant managers. Educators and SM are over paid in relation to leads and Assistant Managers. -Company values being institutionalized (tenured) employees and doest not embrace diverse experience that could benefit sales. Cult like mid-senior leadership - too much off the floor t...
I do not really know Lovely work environment
